---
title: edu-math
description: Python tools for math education workflows.
---

`edu-math` is a Python package for math education workflows.

The package is currently at its initial infrastructure stage. The project
includes source packaging, tests, linting, documentation, release automation,
and CI scaffolding.

## Development status

The public API is intentionally small while the package design is established.
See [API reference](api.qmd) for the current exported interface.
